parameters.formDescription: input_mode=form_upload thi upload file/text. input_mode=drive_url thi cung cap full Google Drive URL.

assignments.name: image_prompt_fixed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.image_prompt_fixed || 'Create realistic image for the script chunk.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { request_id: $json.request_id, workflow: $json.workflow, chunk_key: $json.chunk_key, part_name: $json.partName, index: $json.index, text: $json.text, prompt: $json.image_prompt_fixed, model: $json.image_model, aspect_ratio: $json.image_aspect_ratio, input_mode: $json.input_mode, output_mode: $json.output_mode, drive_file_id: $json.drive_file_id || '', source: 'text-to-images' } }}
